mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sa_bill_provider ( dbp_id, dbp_pass, dbp_apikey, dbp_co_num, dbp_biztype, dbp_name, dbp_bizclassification, dbp_ceoname, dbp_busename, dbp_ir_name, dbp_ir_cell, dbp_email, dbp_address, dbp_UI_KEYNO )VALUES( #{hometaxbill_id}, #{spass}, #{apikey}, #{ir_companynumber}, #{ir_biztype}, #{ir_companyname}, #{ir_bizclassification}, #{ir_ceoname}, #{ir_busename}, #{ir_name}, #{ir_cell}, #{ir_email}, #{ir_companyaddress}, #{dbp_UI_KEYNO} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sa_bill_provider SET dbp_id = #{hometaxbill_id}, dbp_pass = #{spass}, dbp_apikey = #{apikey}, dbp_co_num = #{ir_companynumber}, dbp_biztype = #{ir_biztype}, dbp_name = #{ir_companyname}, dbp_bizclassification = #{ir_bizclassification}, dbp_ceoname = #{ir_ceoname}, dbp_busename = #{ir_busename}, dbp_ir_name = #{ir_name}, dbp_ir_cell = #{ir_cell}, dbp_email = #{ir_email}, dbp_address = #{ir_companyaddress} WHERE dbp_keyno = #{dbp_keyno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sa_bill_supplied ( dbs_co_num, dbs_biztype , dbs_name, dbs_bizclassification, dbs_taxnum, dbs_ceoname, dbs_busename1, dbs_name1, dbs_cell1, dbs_email1, dbs_busename2, dbs_name2, dbs_cell2, dbs_email2, dbs_address, dbs_UI_KEYNO )VALUES( #{ie_companynumber}, #{ie_biztype}, #{ie_companyname}, #{ie_bizclassification}, #{ie_taxnumber}, #{ie_ceoname}, #{ie_busename1}, #{ie_name1}, #{ie_cell1}, #{ie_email1}, #{ie_busename2}, #{ie_name2}, #{ie_cell2}, #{ie_email2}, #{ie_companyaddress}, #{dbs_UI_KEYNO} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sa_bill_supplied SET dbs_co_num = #{ie_companynumber}, dbs_biztype = #{ie_biztype}, dbs_name = #{ie_companyname}, dbs_bizclassification = #{ie_bizclassification}, dbs_taxnum = #{ie_taxnumber}, dbs_ceoname = #{ie_ceoname}, dbs_busename1 = #{ie_busename1}, dbs_name1 = #{ie_name1}, dbs_cell1 = #{ie_cell1}, dbs_email1 = #{ie_email1}, dbs_busename2 = #{ie_busename2}, dbs_name2 = #{ie_name2}, dbs_cell2 = #{ie_cell2}, dbs_email2 = #{ie_email2}, dbs_address = #{ie_companyaddress} WHERE dbs_keyno = #{dbs_keyno}

UPDATE sa_bill_log SET dbl_provider_key = #{dbp_keyno}, dbl_supplied_key = #{dbs_keyno}, dbl_cash = #{cash}, dbl_scheck = #{scheck}, dbl_draft = #{draft}, dbl_uncollected = #{uncollected}, dbl_chargetotal = #{chargetotal}, dbl_taxtotal = #{taxtotal}, dbl_grandtotal = #{grandtotal}, dbl_subject = #{subject}, dbl_unit = #{unit}, dbl_quantity = #{quantity}, dbl_unitprice = #{unitprice}, dbl_supplyprice = #{supplyprice}, dbl_tax = #{tax}, dbl_description = #{description}, dbl_p_name = #{ir_companyname}, dbl_s_name = #{ie_companyname}, dbl_purposetype = #{purposetype}, dbl_partytypecode = #{partytypecode}, dbl_sub_description = #{sub_description}, dbl_issuedate = #{issuedate}, dbl_sub_issuedate = #{sub_issuedate}, dbl_si_hcnt = #{si_hcnt}, dbl_homeid = #{homemunseo_id} WHERE dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}
UPDATE sa_bill_log SET dbl_checkYN = 'W', dbl_status = '2' WHERE dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sa_bill_log l left join sa_bill_provider p on l.dbl_provider_key = p.dbp_keyno left join sa_bill_supplied s on l.dbl_supplied_key = s.dbs_keyno where l.dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}
select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 1 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m')
select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 2 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m')
select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 3 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') and dbl_UI_KEYNO = #{UI_KEYNO}
select dbl_homeid from sa_bill_log where dbl_provider_key = #{dbp_keyno} order by Conn_date desc limit 1
mapper.sql:
from ( select B.* , @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 as COUNT from ( select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 1 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') order by dbl_keyno ) B where (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 )AA where 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)
mapper.sql:
from ( select B.* , @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 as COUNT from ( select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 2 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') order by dbl_keyno ) B where (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 )AA where 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)
mapper.sql:
from ( select B.* , @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 as COUNT from ( select * from sa_bill_log where dbl_sub_keyno = 3 and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') order by dbl_keyno ) B where (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 )AA where 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_p_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_s_name LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_subject LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_grandtotal LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_issuedate LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR dbl_status LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
and dbl_UI_KEYNO = #{UI_KEYNO}

SELECT COUNT(*)
AND dbl_UI_KEYNO = #{UI_KEYNO}
SELECT dbl_homeid FROM sa_bill_log a left join sa_bill_provider b on a.dbl_provider_key = b.dbp_keyno where b.dbp_keyno = #{dbp_keyno} order by dbl_homeid desc limit 1

SELECT p.dbp_ir_cell FROM sa_bill_log l left join sa_bill_provider p on l.dbl_provider_key = p.dbp_keyno left join sa_bill_supplied s on l.dbl_supplied_key = s.dbs_keyno where l.dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}

SELECT s.dbs_cell1 FROM sa_bill_log l left join sa_bill_provider p on l.dbl_provider_key = p.dbp_keyno left join sa_bill_supplied s on l.dbl_supplied_key = s.dbs_keyno where l.dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}
SELECT * FROM sa_bill_log l left join sa_bill_provider p on l.dbl_provider_key = p.dbp_keyno left join sa_bill_supplied s on l.dbl_supplied_key = s.dbs_keyno where l.dbl_keyno = #{listtable}
select dbl_keyno from sa_bill_log where dbl_status = '2'

select a.dbl_keyno , b.dbp_id , b.dbp_pass , b.dbp_apikey , a.dbl_homeid ,b.dbp_name, a.dbl_s_name from sa_bill_log a left join sa_bill_provider b on a.dbl_provider_key = b.dbp_keyno where (dbl_status = 0 or dbl_status = -1) and date_format(a.Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') and dbl_keyno = #{dbl_keyno}
SELECT * FROM sa_bill_log where dbl_UI_KEYNO = #{UI_KEYNO} and date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now()-interval 1 month, '%Y-%m')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sa_bill_log ( dbl_provider_key, dbl_supplied_key, dbl_cash, dbl_scheck, dbl_draft, dbl_uncollected, dbl_chargetotal, dbl_taxtotal, dbl_grandtotal, dbl_subject, dbl_unit, dbl_quantity, dbl_unitprice, dbl_supplyprice, dbl_tax, dbl_description, dbl_sub_keyno, dbl_p_name, dbl_s_name, dbl_purposetype, dbl_partytypecode, dbl_issueid, dbl_typecode1, dbl_typecode2, dbl_sub_description, dbl_issuedate, dbl_sub_issuedate, dbl_si_hcnt, dbl_homeid, dbl_UI_KEYNO )VALUES( #{dbl_provider_key}, #{dbl_supplied_key}, #{dbl_cash}, #{dbl_scheck}, #{dbl_draft}, #{dbl_uncollected}, #{dbl_chargetotal}, #{dbl_taxtotal}, #{dbl_grandtotal}, #{dbl_subject}, #{dbl_unit}, #{dbl_quantity}, #{dbl_unitprice}, #{dbl_supplyprice}, #{dbl_tax}, #{dbl_description}, #{dbl_sub_keyno}, #{dbl_p_name}, #{dbl_s_name}, #{dbl_purposetype}, #{dbl_partytypecode}, #{dbl_issueid}, #{dbl_typecode1}, #{dbl_typecode2}, #{dbl_sub_description}, #{dbl_issuedate}, #{dbl_sub_issuedate}, #{dbl_si_hcnt}, #{dbl_homeid}, #{dbl_UI_KEYNO} )
mapper.select: SELECT UI_KEYNO FROM u_userinfo
